creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
The new stable branch of Open MPI was released two month ago begining with the 1.6 version which carries a bunch of improvements and bugfixes over the 1.4 version (http://www.open-mpi.org/community/lists/announce/2012/05/0048.php).

I've done an update of the net/openmpi port directory to build and install this new version. This version was tested on amd64 without any problem either at build, install, package, run or deinstall times.

I've attached a diff of the new port directory from the original (1.4.1) version. I can also provide a full tar archive if needed.

Notes: this version will change a bunch of libraries soversion, so packages and applications depending on net/openmpi should be rebuilded.

Fix: Update the port if patch is OK

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: --
